creator: kuku@blues.physik.rwth-aachen.de
text:
Due to typo in /etc/rc.conf 
           nis_yppasswd_enable=...
                      ^
           nis_yppasswd_flags=...
                      ^

Fix: 

nis_yppasswdd_enable=..
nis_yppasswdd_flags=..
How-To-Repeat: 
	look at /etc/rc.conf and /etc/rc.netstart
